title: alyssum rothmaleri
intro: Alyssum rothmaleri, also known as Rothmaler's Alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the island of Crete in Greece and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum rothmaleri are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Alyssum rothmaleri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
